title: HOME-ARP Comment Submission
description: JSON payload posted by the City of Colorado Springs Drupal Webform when a public comment is submitted on the HOME-ARP Allocation Plan amendment. This is the contract between the Webform and any downstream consumer (city record system, archival storage, analytics, etc.).

webform_id.description: Stable machine name of the source Webform. Consumers use this to route by form.

submission_id.description: Drupal Webform serial number for this submission. Stable per-form, monotonically increasing.

submission_uuid.description: Globally unique identifier for the submission. Stable across systems.

submitted_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the submission was completed.

langcode.description: Language the user submitted in. Drives downstream localization (e.g., follow-up email language).

name.description: Submitter's name. Optional. May be null or empty.

phone.description: Submitter's phone number. Optional. Free-form, not parsed.

zip.description: Submitter's ZIP code. Optional. Used for geographic analysis only.

submitter_role_other.description: Free-text description, populated only when submitter_role = 'other'.

organization.description: Organization the submitter is representing, if applicable.

topics.description: Topics the comment addresses. May be empty.

topic_other.description: Free-text description, populated only when 'other' is in topics.

comment.description: The comment text itself. The only required content field.

attachment.description: Supporting document, if attached. Drupal stores the file; this is a reference.

url.description: Authenticated URL for staff retrieval. Not public.

contact_back.description: Whether the submitter wants follow-up contact.

newsletter.description: Whether the submitter wants to be added to the Housing & Community Vitality newsletter.

needs_alternate_format.description: Whether the submitter requested an alternate format or accommodation. When true, format_needed should be populated and the Office of Accessibility is notified separately.

format_needed.description: Free-text description of the requested accommodation.

_metadata.description: Server-side metadata not collected from the form.

source_url.description: URL the form was submitted from (e.g., /home-arp-comment or /es/home-arp-comment).

user_agent_class.description: Coarse classification of the submitter's user agent. Raw user agent is not transmitted.

ip_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the submitter's IP address salted with a per-form secret. Not the raw IP. Used for deduplication and abuse detection only.

examples.name: Maria Lopez
examples.comment: We are concerned that the proposed allocation reduces TBRA in favor of capital projects. The waitlist for TBRA is already 14 months in this area...
